name: kanban-board-vanilla-js
description: A dependency-free Kanban board with persistent drag-and-drop cards.

scripts.test: node --test tests/models/board-state.test.js tests/services/board-labels.test.js tests/services/board-storage.test.js tests/services/board-backup.test.js tests/services/board-history.test.js tests/services/board-search.test.js tests/services/board-search-summary.test.js
